title: SCIM 2.0 User Resource (RFC 7643 §4.1)
description: Validates a SCIM 2.0 'User' resource as defined in RFC 7643 §4.1. Schema URN: urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:User. Pinned to UIAO_143. Intentionally permissive (additionalProperties left open) to honor the SCIM extensibility model in RFC 7643 §3.3; consumers (e.g. middleware in Spec 2 D3.2) MAY layer a closed schema on top.

userName.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.1. Service provider's unique identifier for the user. REQUIRED, case insensitive, MUST be unique across the service provider's User set.

name.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.1. Components of the user's name.

profileUrl.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.1. URL of the user's online profile.

userType.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.1. Relationship between the organization and the user (e.g. 'Employee', 'Contractor', 'Intern', 'Temp').

preferredLanguage.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.1. HTTP Accept-Language-style value per RFC 7231 §5.3.5.

locale.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.1. RFC 5646 language tag for localization.

active.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.1. Administrative status; true = able to log in, false = suspended (provider-defined).

password.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.1. Mutability writeOnly; MUST NOT be returned by the service provider.

emails.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.2. Email addresses; canonical type values include 'work', 'home', 'other'.

phoneNumbers.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.2. Phone numbers per RFC 3966; canonical type values 'work', 'home', 'mobile', 'fax', 'pager', 'other'.

ims.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.2. Instant messaging addresses; canonical type values 'aim', 'gtalk', 'icq', 'xmpp', 'msn', 'skype', 'qq', 'yahoo', 'other'.

photos.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.2. URIs to user images; canonical type values 'photo', 'thumbnail'.

addresses.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.2. Physical mailing addresses; canonical type values 'work', 'home', 'other'.

groups.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.2. Groups the user belongs to; mutability readOnly. Canonical type values 'direct', 'indirect'.

entitlements.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.2. Entitlements granted to the user; no canonical types.

roles.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.2. Roles representing who the user is (e.g. 'Student', 'Faculty'); no canonical types.

x509Certificates.description: RFC 7643 §4.1.2. Each value contains exactly one DER-encoded X.509 certificate, base64-encoded per RFC 4648 §4.
